rulings.Case Title: ELIDA BARILLAS et al VS. AVAIRPROS SERVICES, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, September 29, 2011, line 1, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED, FAILURE TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT FAILS TO ESTABLISH DESIGN IMMUNITY DEFENSE. CCSF DOES NOT SUFFICIENTLY SHOW THAT THERE WAS DISCRETIONARY APPROVAL OF THE DESIGN. THE BRIDGE DID NOT COMPLY WITH THE PLANS IN THAT IT LACKED THE SPECIFIED MIRRORS AND WARNING LIGHTS/ALARMS. DEFENDANT FAILS TO ESTABLISH THAT NO DANGEROUS CONDITION EXISTED. FACTUAL ISSUE RAISED WHETHER PLAINTIFF ACTED WITH DUE CARE AND WHETHER HER CONDUCT WAS REASONABLY FORESEEABLE. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED AS TO THE GENERAL NEGLIGENCE CAUSE OF ACTION. AMENDED COMPLAINT DOES NOT PLEAD A VIABLE CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE NO STATUTORY BASIS IS STATED. TRIAL JUDGE TO DETERMINE WHETHER THE DEFENSES ARE TRIED FIRST. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ELIDA BARILLAS et al VS. AVAIRPROS SERVICES, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, September 29, 2011, line 1, CROSS-DEFENDANT CATHAY PACIFIC AIRWAYS, LTD.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED, FAILURE TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. COURT SUSTAINS OBJECTIONS TO MOWRER DECLARATION. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED AS TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE THE PARTIES DID NOT HAVE A CONTRACTUAL RELATIONSHIP. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED AS TO REMAINDER FOR FAILURE TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. THE COURT SUSTAINS THE OBJECTION AS TO THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED WITH THE REPLY. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ROGELIO HECHAVARRIA VS. ELIAS GEORGOPOULOS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Motion To Quash Pltf'S Deposition Subpoena Duces Tecum, Or, In The Alternative, For Protective Order And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, September 29, 2011, line 1, OTHER CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO Re-Notice Of Motion To Quash Plaintiff's Deposition Subpoena Duces Tecum, Or, In The Alternative, For Protective Order And Request For Sanctions. DENIED. THE CCSF SHALL PROVIDE RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS, SUBJECT TO A PROTECTIVE ORDER, WHICH DO NOT REFLECT THE THOUGHTS AND IMPRESSIONS OF THE INDIVIDUALS WHO INVESTIGATED ANY SUCH COMPLAINTS. THE PARTIES SHALL MEET AND CONFER RE: AN APPROPRIATE PROTECTIVE ORDER. REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. BOTH SIDES ACTED WITH SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION. =(302/CWW)
